rulings.Case Title: T&C PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2023 line 1. RESPONDENT ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs is CONTINUED to May 24, 2023 per the stipulation of the parties. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claim; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Douglas J. Lief, Esq. In Support Thereof;

rulings.Case Title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. DON GRAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Don Gray To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents And To Deem Matters Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 16, 2023 line 7. PLAINTIFF DEVENDRA PATEL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Don Gray To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents And To Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Parties are ordered to meet and confer at 8:30 a.m. in person. Defendant is to provide complete, verified responses without objections Form Interrogatories - General to Defendant Don Gray, Set One; Form Interrogatories - Unlawful Detainer to Defendant Don Gray, Set One; Requests for Production of Documents to Defendant Don Gray, Set One; and Special Interrogatories to Defendant Don Gray, Set One, within 5 day of the service of the notice of entry on this order. All Requests for Admission to Defendant Don Gray, Set One, are deemed admitted. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
